title: Mason Cash Cane S2 Oval Baker 15cm
features: BAKER | The Mason Cash Cane Bakers were first manufactured the early 19th century, and have timeless charm; The bakeware is instantly recognisable and look comfortable in both contemporary kitchens or country kitchens
CARE & USE | Made from stoneware, the cane bakeware range is oven, microwave, freezer and dishwasher safe
DIMENSIONS | The S2 Cane oval baker measures 15cm x 11cm x 5.5cm, and has a capacity of 330ml
CANE | The Cane bakeware come in an array of shapes and sizes, making the range perfect for both professional kitchens or home cooking

MASON CASH | First designed in 1901, the original Mason Cash mixing bowl has endured the test of time and become something of a design classic; Alongside the much loved mixing bowl, Mason Cash is also well known for our classic pudding basins, cane pet bowls and bakeware
